fields.name: Reminder Terms Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the reminder terms code for the reminder.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Grace Period
fields.tooltip: Specifies the length of the grace period for this reminder level.

fields.name: Additional Fee (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount of the additional fee in LCY that will be added on the reminder.

fields.name: Calculate Interest
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether to calculate interest on the reminder lines.

fields.name: Due Date Calculation
fields.tooltip: Specifies a formula that determines how to calculate the due date on the reminder.

fields.name: Add. Fee per Line Amount (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the line amount of the additional fee.

fields.name: Add. Fee per Line Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the additional fee.

fields.name: Add. Fee Calculation Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies how the additional fee is calculated. Fixed: The Additional Fee values on the line on the Reminder Levels page are used. Dynamics Single: The per-line values on the Additional Fee Setup page are used. Accumulated Dynamic: The values on the Additional Fee Setup page are used.
